title: Legal and Development Guidelines
summary: Ethical scraping, IP, monetization, and development standards for Pokemon Champions Companion, including a per-source ToS audit (last reviewed 2026-04-16).
scope: data source ToS audit (PokeAPI, Pikalytics, Smogon/pkmn, Limitless VGC, Serebii, Game8)
third-party data recipients (Anthropic, Supabase, Vercel, Ko-fi, EthicalAds)
notes: Constraints document — its rules (Game8 HIGH risk excluded, Pikalytics safe, Serebii MEDIUM) should surface as project constraints in the synthesis.
